audit_items.proof_trace: The balance-below-min condition correctly requires `isPriceValid` before computing and comparing `assetBalanceUsdValue`; comparing a stale/zero price-derived USD value against `minAuctionSizeUsd` would be unsound, so the guard is intentional. When price is stale, `bid()` already reverts (`_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` at L429), freezing the auction without further fund drain. The unconditional duration condition (`auctionStart + auctionDuration < block.timestamp`) guarantees every auction eventually terminates regardless of price validity, making the system safe.
